leadText: The Tiny Mushroom (Japanese: ちいさなキノコ Small Mushroom), formatted TinyMushroom prior to Generation VI, is a valuable item introduced in Generation II. In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen, two of these can be exchanged for a Move Reminder's service. The Big Mushroom is a larger and more valuable version of this item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen , two TinyMushrooms can be given to the Move Reminder on Two Island to relearn one move for one Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C An ordinary mushroom. Sell low. R S Colo XD A plain, ordinary mushroom. Can be sold cheaply. FR LG A small and rare mushroom. It is quite popular among certain people. E A plain mushroom that would sell at a cheap price. D P Pt HG SS A small and rare mushroom. It is quite popular among certain maniacal fan segments. B W B2 W2 A small and rare mushroom. It is sought after by collectors. X Y OR AS S M US UM A very small and rare mushroom. It's popular with a certain class of collectors and sought out by them. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A very small and rare mushroom. It's popular with a certain class of collectors. S V ZA A small and rare mushroom. It's quite popular with a certain class of collectors.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Quest Soft and small ingredients.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price G S C HG SS $ 500 $ 250 R S E FR LG D P Pt W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V ZA N/A $ 250 B $ 3000 $ 250 In the Generation V games, the TinyMushroom can be sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 for $ 500. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Tiny Mushroom can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 2,000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen , two TinyMushrooms can be given to the Move Reminder on Two Island to relearn one move for one Pokémon.
